risks.title: Public S3 Bucket Exposed
risks.description: Bucket 'prod-user-uploads' has public read access enabled. Sensitive user data may be accessible.

risks.title: Database Port 5432 Open to Internet
risks.description: PostgreSQL port is accessible from 0.0.0.0/0. Should be restricted to VPC only.

risks.title: Overprivileged IAM Role
risks.description: Role 'lambda-execution-role' has AdministratorAccess policy attached. Violates least-privilege principle.

risks.title: API Key Exposed in Environment Variable
risks.description: Stripe API key found in plaintext environment variable on payment-service container.

risks.title: Unencrypted EBS Volume
risks.description: EBS volume attached to ml-inference-server is not encrypted at rest.

risks.title: SSH Port 22 Open to All
risks.description: Security group allows SSH from 0.0.0.0/0. Should use bastion host or VPN.
